nasb.text: Then the people of the land took Joahaz the son of Josiah, and made him king in place of his father in Jerusalem.

esv.text: The people of the land took Jehoahaz the son of Josiah and made him king in his father’s place in Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 猶大地的人民選了約西亞的兒子約哈斯，立他在耶路撒冷接續他父親作王。

ccb.text: 犹大人在耶路撒冷立约西亚的儿子约哈斯接替他父亲做王。
